---
title: "Donadas Brutas"
author: ""
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: full
description-meta: "Welcome to my blog, I’m thrilled to welcome you! Here, you will find a collection of articles on a wide variety of topics. Take a look around and let me know what you think!"

listing:
  - id: posts_2024
    contents:
      # - "laptop-mic-obs/index.qmd"
      - "inflation/index.qmd"
      - "hello-world/index.qmd"
      - "latex/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/blog/listing.ejs
    categories: true
  # - id: posts_2022
  #   contents:
  #     - "hello-world/index.qmd"
  #   sort: "date desc"
  #   template: ../html/blog/listing.ejs

toc-title: Year
toc-location: right
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
image: ""
code-tools: false
comments: false
---

Welcome to my blog, `Donatas Brutas`. Any kind of feedback is welcome, thanks for your interest and time.

## 2024

:::{#posts_2024}
:::

## 2023

:::{#posts_2023}
:::

## 2022

:::{#posts_2022}
:::

---

The blog post listing is based on the website source of [Andrew Heiss](https://www.andrewheiss.com/), who has put together an incredible listing template under CC-BY-SA 4.0 license. Thank you!
